flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Radford M Locklin Technical College rose 35% between 2009 and 2012 ($7.4k → $10.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Radford M Locklin Technical College rose 34% between 2009 and 2012 ($1.9k → $2.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Radford M Locklin Technical College fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (17.7% → 15.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Radford M Locklin Technical College rose 140% between 2021 and 2024 (32.3% → 77.4%).
